analysis.reasoning: Core message: Celebrates the 70th anniversary of China’s foreign aid and the 2nd anniversary of CIDCA, stressing solidarity and that China stands with the world to overcome COVID-19. Evaluation: CH1 (West immoral/hostile) – Not present; no mention or contrast with the West. CH2 (China is a benevolent power) – Yes; highlights China's foreign aid history, international development cooperation agency, solidarity, and standing united with the world against COVID-19, aligning with benevolence, cooperation, and support for global development. CH3 (epic history) – No; mentions an anniversary but not framed as historical resilience or overcoming adversities linked to CCP governance. CH4 (appropriate political system/values domestically) – No; focus is international aid, not domestic system or values. CH5 (CCP government succeeds) – No; does not emphasize domestic development or leadership success; the focus is aid/solidarity. CH6 (culture/nature/heritage) – No. Conclusion: Only CH2 is promoted.
